task_completion.description: Navigate to the Warehouse & Locators window and select 'HQ Warehouse'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Warehouse & Locators' window is open and 'HQ Warehouse' is visible as the selected record.

task_completion.description: Access the Locators tab for the selected warehouse
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Locators' tab is selected or active within the 'HQ Warehouse' record view.
A locator record is visible with Search Key/Value 'OV-01-01' and coordinates X:1, Y:1, Z:1.
A locator record is visible with Search Key/Value 'OV-01-02' and coordinates X:1, Y:1, Z:2.
A locator record is visible with Search Key/Value 'OV-01-03' and coordinates X:1, Y:1, Z:3.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere GUI to create the locators
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web interface, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual iDempiere form fields or grid, not a text editor like gedit or nano.

integrity.description: The locators appear as genuine records in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The locators are shown in the standard iDempiere grid or form view with appropriate application styling and buttons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Warehouse: 'HQ Warehouse'. Required Locators: 1) Value: 'OV-01-01', X:1, Y:1, Z:1. 2) Value: 'OV-01-02', X:1, Y:1, Z:2. 3) Value: 'OV-01-03', X:1, Y:1, Z:3. All locators must be active.
